scenes.narrationText: on the weaker side: caffeine tradeoffs are real. sleep disruption, jitters, and overuse risk stop this from being a clean automatic S. habit dependence can creep in. a stronger practical downside than green tea usually carries. people often ruin it with sugary add-ins. the practical version consumed is not always the clean black-coffee version.
